headline: Amazon’s AWS commits $1 billion toward new unit for embedded AI engineers
summary: Amazon said on Tuesday it is creating a new division under its Amazon Web Services cloud unit employing so-called forward-deployed ‌engineers who embed with customers to help them more quickly and efficiently adopt artificial ‌intelligence software.  The company is committing an initial $1 billion to the initiative with the goal of sending five to six ​pods of engineers to customers for 45-day periods, said Francessca Vasquez, AWS vice president of frontier AI engineering and services.  Forward-deployed engineers are versatile workers ⁠who embed directly alongside clients, navigate internal politics and write production-grade code to help make models deliver results.

content.title: Amazon’s AWS commits $1 billion toward new unit for embedded AI engineers
content.summary: Amazon said on Tuesday it is creating a new division under its Amazon Web Services cloud unit employing so-called forward-deployed ‌engineers who embed with customers to help them more quickly and efficiently adopt artificial ‌intelligence software.  The company is committing an initial $1 billion to the initiative with the goal of sending five to six ​pods of engineers to customers for 45-day periods, said Francessca Vasquez, AWS vice president of frontier AI engineering and services.  Forward-deployed engineers are versatile workers ⁠who embed directly alongside clients, navigate internal politics and write production-grade code to help make models deliver results.

headline: CME Group to Launch Single Stock Futures on July 27
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced it will launch Single Stock futures across more than 50 of the top U.S. stocks on July 27, pending completion of all regulatory review and processes. This new offering will include 55 larger-sized and 22 Micro-sized futures contracts, providing market participants with additional flexibility to manage their equity exposure.
